ul.li: Estimator: Supports range, equality, and null-check operators
Unit: All costs relative to single-page sequential read
Validation: Ensures row counts never drop to zero to prevent optimizer bypass

g.text: TableMetadata { pages: u64, rows: u64, ColumnStats[] }
estimate_selectivity(col_stats: struct, op: enum, val: any)

div.p: Ensures est_rows >= 1.0 to avoid zero-cost optimization traps in nested loops or index scans.
